[CISA KEV] CVE-2026-33634 — Aquasecurity Trivy
description: Aquasecurity Trivy contains an embedded malicious code vulnerability that could allow an attacker to gain access to everything in the CI/CD environment, including all tokens, SSH keys, cloud credentials, database passwords, and any sensitive configuration in memory.
relevance_tags: aquasecurity trivy embedded malicious code vulnerability

metadata.action: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
